title: Built a profitable BTC time-based model. Selling it to ONE serious buyer.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I’ve spent months building a BTC time-based entry/exit model that actually works — not the usual “indicator mashup” garbage people sell here.

This is a **pattern-driven, time-aligned system** that gives:

* Consistent entries
* Controlled exits
* No overfitting gimmicks

I’m only selling it because my capital is too small to scale it the way it deserves.  
Not desperate — just practical.

I’ll give ONE the source-code with other scripts and documentations.

And yes, I’ll say it straight:  
If anyone thinks they can build a cleaner, more stable **time-synchronized BTC model**, go ahead and try. Most people can’t even build a reproducible backtest, forget a stable live system.

I’m looking for **ONE buyer** who is serious, technical, and wants a **REAL** system.

DM if you are really interested I will provide the model\_report.

This is the stats of the model:

https://preview.redd.it/y12qzjv5574g1.png?width=964&format=png&auto=webp&s=63d4944c0076668ea5f892cd7d1111139f2b79e9

comments.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
comments.body: Lol Risk management left the chat 😂😂😂😂

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Bro it is with risk managed..... I don't know what you are laughing at..... Check the reports.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: What's you sizing and how the strategie defines it?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Based on 1.0 fixed lot and not increasing or decreasing....
If I have used adaptive lots thats changed with balance then the result was very big.. I mentioned that in the report

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: You have a thesis/document you can send the text that doesn't reveal you strategy? Would love to take a look

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1XLGViXvJcfER-8_ZFddecsbmshR0DAwL/view?usp=drivesdk

Here it is.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: Average risk/Reward Ratio- 1:1.1 thats a joke 😂😂

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Bro, that's average_profits/average_loss..... Cumsum the returns... That's how my model works.... If you want to buy it I can give you a trial if you like. But don't judge it without seeing how well it performs..

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: yea at this point you really burned yourself in your comments bro

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Leave it. Don't worry about my model. Just waiting for an investor or a buyer... If you are one we can continue, else leave it here...
you will burn money on fake stuff, strategies but not invest in real ones (not only you, but the newer ones)

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: Lol I also make trading bots but I don't sell them I don't burn my money I share ideas only and try to help my friends and they are more than happy, I was trying to help you when I said to delete the comments bro but you don't want to listen then get roasted because what you created is unrealistic and you can't believe it

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Bro I am trading it for 7 months now.... And got 140% ROI. So I believe what I have developed is really outstanding and it is in real.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: Bro people in this niche know math and that ROI doesn't add up to the backtesting you did

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Can you explain.... Dm is good.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: No now I roast you here, you put that you have a 473% revenue over 5 years soo that is compounded, soo average return per year is 78.9% and you say you did double in 7 months?? Well that just looks like you are lying

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Check the monthly pnl in the last 7 months....
From March to October. Around 70,000 points net_return... Assuming capital of 50000 with 1 lots.. mine was around $220

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Brother I think you need to slow down. Maybe your model is not good enough, maybe mine is better than you. Maybe the report is not that greatly organized but the model is real and the numbers are real. Stop pushing you to prove me wrong. I welcome you for the trial. Just tell me if you need trial or not.

And let's end this conversation here

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: I'm not the one in the need of selling my bots 😂😂😂 maybe your bot can't make money soo you need to sell it to make money you know like the gurus

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: But thankyou for your suggestion.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: Sooo it's not based on portfolio size?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: No sir the stats I attached is with fixed lots. Let me share the report.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: Bro for your good delete this comment and work on risk management

comments.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
comments.body: And you just basically hold during a rally 😂

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: No sir....... I have entry and exit rules of 4 days holding period.. not "Buy and if in loss, hold."

replies.author: strategyForLife70
replies.body:
285 trades placed for data sample 3yrs (jan2022-nov2025) 

sure sounds like you been 'buy & holding' in a bull market

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
No sir...
My model is based on 4 days holding period... 6 trades a month.

replies.author: [deleted]
replies.body: [removed]

comments.author: YOLO401Kto0
comments.body: I only have one question. DID you use any AI, ChatGPT, Gemini….  To make this model?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Yes but only to write the code and not like "Hey gpt make me a strategy." I have some knowledge on coding and used that knowledge to create the model I intended to. I created the model on my full understanding of markets and data and how to trade.

replies.author: YOLO401Kto0
replies.body: So my other question is if it’s this good why not trade propfirms? Also do you have any forward test data like on myfxbooks with at least demo accounts?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I don't have myfxbook data sir because first of all it is BTC model and I did not have any idea on how myfxbook works.. but i am looking to launch it on myfxbook and trade to gather data publicly. I thought I will be trading it only and I did on Binance. I got one client who is trading with his capital with my model from March and up pretty good (~140%). But now he is pulling out money for his needs so I am now in need to sell it. 
And prop firms, I don't think they will allow me to trade it because if I trade it on prop firms it would take me months to pass the evaluation phase with controlled DD. If I control drawdown to 10% then my monthly return would around average 3%. It would take me months to pass. My model allows capital protection but it would take me months... And now I am in need of money(urgency) so I am finding real investor to sell it with source code for minimum amount.

I have trades data of my model from 2021-2025....

replies.author: YOLO401Kto0
replies.body: I understand what you're trying to say, but as someone with years of experience in this industry, I can confidently tell you that no rational person will pay for something that doesn't demonstrate real-time, proven results through forward testing, usually evidenced by MyFXbook. Additionally, you can provide an investor read-only login to the broker you used with verified history, which might make people reconsider their doubts about its legitimacy. Even if I wanted to invest in your system, I have zero solid third-party verified proof that your bot is even real. It's not rude to suggest you put yourself in others' shoes and ask, "Would I buy this and believe in this person if I were presented with this info?"

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I understand sir and i respect your thoughts 
I am open to make you understand on how it works and why this system really works with proper data and also I can give you a live trial of my model signals of you like.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: I have full report on forward test data, would you like to see it.

replies.author: YOLO401Kto0
replies.body: What’s the source of that data is the main thing here. As I said it’s either third-party verified like MyFXbook or a read-only investor login to the past broker you used. If not I would suggest you start it with a demo account on the live market asap and gather more data on the forward test.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I am currently trading with my savings on Binance to prove my models legitimacy in order to seek investors or to sell it.
But as you said I will start trading it on myfxbook to gather data publicly.

We can fix a time to talk about this model. 

But I don't have any option to show you the real trades of my model because I started trading from September on my own account in Binance. I can show you these 3 month trades if you like.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Can I message you sir personally?
